focus.why: Music that creates space without demanding attention

relaxing.why: Gentle sounds that help the mind settle

energizing.why: Music with soul that lifts without overwhelming

celebrating.why: Can't help but move to these

personal_favorites.why: Pure soul. Makes me think of second chances
Japan memories. Happy and sad together

conversational_music_mentions: You know what song this reminds me of...
There's this track I love that captures this feeling...
Music helps me process things like this too...
